feature.label: Hybridize Functions Evaluation (Internal)
feature.provider-name: City University of New York (CUNY) Hunter College
feature.description: Internal evaluation tooling for the Hybridize Functions refactoring. Not shipped to end users; packages the evaluator so it can be run headlessly (command line) for reproducibility.
feature.copyright: 2025 Raffi Khatchadourian and Tatiana Castro Vélez. All rights reserved.
